experience.title: Deputy Vice President - Conversational AI
experience.description: Strategic AI Infrastructure & Platform Leadership. Architected and operationalised a secure, air-gapped Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) ecosystem. Leveraged LangChain and LangGraph to build complex, stateful agentic workflows. Deployed open-source LLMs (Mistral, Llama-3) using ELK as a high-scale Vector Database.

experience.title: Analytics Delivery Head
experience.description: Architected ML-powered solutions for Healthcare (ambulance dispatch optimisation), Financial Risk (fraud detection), and Ad-tech (campaign ROI optimisation). Led a cross-functional team of data scientists and engineers to deliver production-ready AI models for global clients.

experience.title: Head of Technology Architecture
experience.description: Built a custom ML-based recommendation engine from scratch, resulting in a 180% improvement in user engagement. Managed the full-stack development of semantic analysis and automated tagging workflows for 1M+ posts.

experience.title: Chief Manager - Business Intelligence
experience.description: Transformed subscription architecture and built predictive analytics for collection management. Reduced user detractors by 50% through text mining and continuous consumer research.

experience.title: Sales Manager
experience.description: Managed distributed sales operation achieving Rs 200 Cr+ disbursement targets through process optimisation and team leadership.

experience.title: Sales Manager
